planSummary: End-to-end automated tests covering all 10 phases of the tenant billing suite: trial lifecycle, saved cards, cancel/reactivate, proration, dunning, hard limits, invoices/PDF, usage page, admin force-charge/cancel-scheduled.
runSummary: All E2E billing tests passing. Phases 1-9 merged to main. Phase 10 adds admin billing action E2E coverage.

cases.summary: Trial subscription activates after successful charge
cases.text: Create an org and start a subscription with planId=BASIC. Verify status=TRIALING. Seed a DRAFT invoice and record a successful payment. Assert status transitions to ACTIVE and lastPaymentAt is set.

cases.summary: Payment failure transitions subscription to PAST_DUE
cases.text: From ACTIVE state, seed an invoice and record a payment failure with reason=insufficient_funds. Assert status=PAST_DUE, pastDueSince is set, retryCount=1, and invoice status=FAILED with failureReason populated.

cases.summary: Grace period expiry suspends PAST_DUE subscription
cases.text: Set pastDueSince to 3 days ago (beyond the 2-day grace period). Run EnforceGracePeriodCron. Assert subscription status transitions to SUSPENDED.

cases.summary: Successful charge from PAST_DUE reactivates subscription
cases.text: Return subscription to PAST_DUE, seed an invoice, and record a successful payment. Assert status=ACTIVE, pastDueSince=null, retryCount reset to 0.

cases.summary: Cancel transitions subscription to CANCELED terminal state
cases.text: From ACTIVE state, execute CancelSubscriptionHandler with reason=user-requested. Assert status=CANCELED, canceledAt is set, cancelReason matches.

cases.summary: Double subscription returns 409 conflict
cases.text: Create an org, start a subscription. Attempt to start a second subscription for the same org. Assert the second call throws an 'already has a subscription' error.

cases.summary: Cancel on terminal CANCELED state throws error
cases.text: Cancel an existing subscription, then attempt a second cancel. Assert the second call throws an error (terminal state guard).

cases.summary: Feature flags gate by active plan
cases.text: Assign a plan with specific feature flags enabled. Call GetMyFeaturesHandler. Assert only plan-allowed features are returned. Verify a feature absent from the plan is not in the result.

cases.summary: Employee hard limit enforced per plan
cases.text: Set plan maxEmployees=2. Create 2 employees. Attempt to create a 3rd employee. Assert BadRequestException with employee limit message is thrown.

cases.summary: Usage counter increments on billable events
cases.text: Call IncrementUsageHandler for EMPLOYEE_COUNT. Assert UsageRecord is created with quantity=1. Call again and assert quantity increments. Verify count sums correctly.

cases.summary: Moyasar webhook transitions subscription on payment success
cases.text: Send a Moyasar webhook POST /api/v1/public/billing/webhook with a paid payment event. Assert subscription status moves to ACTIVE and invoice is marked PAID.

cases.summary: Invoice list returns only requesting org's invoices
cases.text: Seed invoices for two orgs A and B. Run list.execute as org A. Assert only org A's invoice IDs appear; org B invoice ID is absent.

cases.summary: Invoice get returns 404 for another org's invoice
cases.text: Seed invoice for org B. Execute get.execute(invB1) in org A context. Assert NotFoundException is thrown.

cases.summary: Invoice hash chain links consecutive invoices
cases.text: Issue two invoices for the same org sequentially. Assert first invoice has previousHash='0'. Assert second invoice's previousHash equals the first invoice's invoiceHash.

cases.summary: Invoice numbering sequences are independent per org
cases.text: Seed and issue invoices for two orgs. Assert both have invoiceNumber matching INV-YYYY-000001 independently — sequences are not shared across tenants.

cases.summary: Admin force-charge calls DunningRetryService for PAST_DUE subscription
cases.text: Create org with PAST_DUE subscription, default saved card, and a FAILED invoice. Mock DunningRetryService.retryInvoice. Execute AdminForceChargeHandler. Assert result.success=true, retryInvoice called once with manual=true.

cases.summary: Admin force-charge returns 404 when org has no subscription
cases.text: Create org without any subscription. Execute AdminForceChargeHandler. Assert NotFoundException with 'No subscription found' message.

cases.summary: Admin force-charge returns 400 when subscription is not PAST_DUE
cases.text: Create org with ACTIVE subscription. Execute AdminForceChargeHandler. Assert BadRequestException with 'not PAST_DUE' message.

cases.summary: Admin cancel-scheduled clears cancelAtPeriodEnd flag
cases.text: Create org with subscription where cancelAtPeriodEnd=true. Execute AdminCancelScheduledHandler. Assert updated subscription has cancelAtPeriodEnd=false. Verify DB persistence.

cases.summary: Admin cancel-scheduled returns 400 when no scheduled cancellation exists
cases.text: Create org with subscription where cancelAtPeriodEnd=false. Execute AdminCancelScheduledHandler. Assert BadRequestException with 'does not have a scheduled cancellation' message.
